CustomField.description: HTTPS URL of the peer org's inbound webhook endpoint that receives cross-org gantt updates. Example: https://mf-prod-org.my.salesforce.com/services/apexrest/delivery/deliveryhub/v1/webhook/cross-org-gantt. Set on each peer org pointing to the OTHER org. Empty disables the bridge regardless of EnableImmediateCrossOrgBridgeDateTime__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Peer org's webhook URL for cross-org gantt sync. Leave empty to disable.
CustomField.label: Cross Org Gantt Peer URL
